diagnosis.final_diagnosis: Symptomatic left thyroid nodule (FNA negative) s/p left hemithyroidectomy, parathyroid autotransplantation, intraoperative nerve monitoring
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient had a left-sided thyroid nodule confirmed by ultrasound, with a fine-needle aspiration biopsy yielding cytology consistent with a benign thyroid nodule. Local symptoms such as choking sensation, swallowing problems, and discomfort prompted the decision for surgical intervention.
